text: I feel a subtle curiosity and alertness here, surrounded by glass, technology, and information. The environment feels clean and modern, evoking a sense of anticipation. The R+D exhibit emphasizes innovation and human-technology relationships. I wonder about the boundaries between personal expression and impersonal progress in such spaces—and where my own place fits among these themes. The displays urge me to think critically about coexistence with intelligence, both artificial and human.
